Component Anatomy
Button Slider

Button

A pressable element that triggers an action. Hover a part name or the live component to explore the anatomy.

Anatomy

Root

The outer <button> element. It is the interactive, focusable container for the entire component.

Carries type="button" to prevent accidental form submission, and receives all native button attributes like disabled, aria-label, etc.

Icon

An optional decorative icon rendered before the label.

Marked aria-hidden="true" so screen readers skip it — the label carries the accessible name. The icon slot accepts any inline SVG or icon component.

Label

The visible text content of the button.

Wrapped in a <span> to allow independent styling (truncation, font-weight overrides) without affecting the root's layout. This span is the primary source of the button's accessible name when no explicit aria-label is set.
